since_last: 59% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.97%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.09% · BTC +0.22% · Gold +1.16% · Nasdaq100 +0.54%. 59% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.97%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.97%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +7.97%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +7.97%, ASML +7.41%, SMR +6.72%, ARM +6.57%, VRT +6.56%. Laggards: SNAP -4.36%, APP -3.40%, META -3.26%, SPCX -2.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.98% at $195.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
